title: OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES GRESHAM OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations, psychiatric case management and assessment, and medication management. Other services include family therapy, individual therapy, parenting support, school consultation and support and home-based services. 831 NW Council Drive Suite 300 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-8pm, Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 258-4381 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 258-4600 Main phone Intake (503) 258-4381 FAX (503) 872-0659 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake and eligibility screening FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Family Counseling Medication Information/Management Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Psychiatric Case Management If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
